mechanism: The US occupying the corridor interior (core PCE ~2.7%, deficit ~6.5% GDP) is the structural cause of the transitional regime: inflation moderate enough for CB credibility on the front end (negative 2Y-SPX) but deficits large enough for term premium pressure on the back end (positive 30Y-SPX).
regime_dependence: Holds only while both parameters remain within the corridor bounds (inflation 2.0-3.5%, deficits 4.5-7.0% GDP). Exiting on either dimension resolves the correlation regime.
